Task.title: Task
Task.description: Represents a task or to-do item.

title.description: The title or description of the task.

completed.description: Whether the task is completed or not.

dueDate.description: The timestamp when the task is due.

createdAt.description: The timestamp when the task was created.

updatedAt.description: The timestamp when the task was last updated.

UserProfile.title: UserProfile
UserProfile.description: Represents a user profile within the Executive Hub application.

id.description: Unique identifier for the user profile.

firstName.description: The first name of the user.

lastName.description: The last name of the user.

email.description: The email address of the user.

title.description: The job title of the user.

company.description: The company the user works for.

dashboardCardIds.description: References to DashboardCard entities. (Relationship: UserProfile 1:N DashboardCard)

id.description: Unique identifier for the expense record.

category.description: The category of the expense (e.g., Travel, Food, Lodging).

Contact.title: Contact
Contact.description: Represents a contact in the rolodex.

avatarId.description: Identifier for the contact's avatar image.

firstName.description: The first name of the contact.

lastName.description: The last name of the contact.

email.description: The email address of the contact.

phone.description: The phone number of the contact.

company.description: The company the contact works for.

title.description: The job title of the contact.

CalendarEvent.title: CalendarEvent
CalendarEvent.description: Represents an event from the integrated calendar.

id.description: Unique identifier for the calendar event.

startTime.description: The start time of the event.

endTime.description: The end time of the event.

LynxInsight.title: LynxInsight
LynxInsight.description: Represents a business insight from the LYNX AI repository.

id.description: Unique identifier for the LYNX insight.

description.description: A detailed description of the insight.

dateGenerated.description: The date and time the insight was generated.

source.description: The source of the insight (e.g., LYNX AI).

dateGenerated.description: The date and time the report was generated.

data.description: The actual report data (e.g., JSON, CSV).

DashboardCard.title: DashboardCard
DashboardCard.description: Represents a card on the personalized dashboard.

id.description: Unique identifier for the dashboard card.

cardType.description: The type of card (e.g., ExpenseSummary, Calendar, LYNXInsight).

configuration.description: Configuration settings for the card (e.g., JSON).

industry.description: The industry the account belongs to.

status.description: The current status of the account.

opportunityType.description: The type of opportunity for the account.

calculationType.description: The method for calculating the opportunity value.

opportunityValue.description: The monetary value of the opportunity for 'Sales' type.

monthlyFee.description: The monthly recurring fee for 'Monthly Fee' type.

contractTerm.description: The term of the contract in months for 'Monthly Fee' type.

equityPercentage.description: The percentage of equity for 'Equity' type.

companyValuation.description: The valuation of the company for 'Equity' type.

confidenceRate.description: The confidence rate of closing the deal, as a percentage.

commission.description: The commission percentage for the deal.

firestore.reasoning:
The Firestore data structure is designed to provide a secure and scalable backend for the Executive Hub application. It follows the principles of Authorization Independence, Clarity of Intent, DBAC (Database-Based Access Control), and QAPs (Rules are not Filters).

**Authorization Independence:** Achieved through denormalization. For example, the `Expense`, `CalendarEvent`, `LynxInsight`, `Report`, and `Account` collections are subcollections of the `/users/{userId}` collection. The `userId` is inherently available within each document, thus avoiding the need for `get()` calls to a parent document for authorization.

**Structural Segregation:** Each top-level collection (e.g., `/users/{userId}/expenses`) maintains a homogeneous security posture.  This means that all documents within a single collection share the same access rules.

**Access Modeling:**  Path-based ownership (`/users/{userId}/expenses/{expenseId}`) is the primary access control mechanism for private user data. This allows simple security rules based on `request.auth.uid == userId`.

**QAPs Support:** The structure supports secure `list` operations through the use of path-based ownership. Rules can easily filter lists to only return data owned by the authenticated user without relying on filtering the data itself.  For example, listing expenses is performed on `/users/{userId}/expenses`, so the rule `request.auth.uid == userId` ensures that only the current user's expenses are returned.

**Justification for Structure Choices:**

*   `/users/{userId}`: This collection stores user profiles.  It's the root for user-specific data.
*   `/users/{userId}/accounts/{accountId}`: Stores client accounts for each user, with clear ownership.
*   `/users/{userId}/expenses/{expenseId}`: Stores expense records for each user. The `userId` in the path makes ownership clear.
*   `/users/{userId}/contacts/{contactId}`: Stores user contacts. The `userId` ensures ownership and isolation.
*   `/users/{userId}/calendarEvents/{calendarEventId}`: Stores calendar events for each user, with similar ownership benefits.

*   `/users/{userId}/tasks/{taskId}`: Stores tasks for each user, with clear ownership.
*   `/users/{userId}/lynxInsights/{lynxInsightId}`: Stores LYNX AI insights specific to a user.
*   `/users/{userId}/reports/{reportId}`: Stores BI reports generated for each user.
*   `/dashboardCards/{dashboardCardId}`: Stores dashboard card configurations. These are global, not user specific, but a `UserProfile` references them via `dashboardCardIds`.

This structure promotes secure, scalable, and maintainable data management within the Executive Hub application.
